claims.text: Confirmed ~$40M exploit of a major ETH-based lending protocol, breaking this cycle (~3h old) - a binary downside shock
Two outlets corroborate the drained-funds figure and on-chain trace; no second narrative competes for the conversation

rationale: One dominant, fresh, adverse catalyst - a confirmed exploit corroborated across news, a YouTube post-mortem, and a forum thread; weighted heavily as bad news is a binary gap risk per the charter.
